name: HaGeZi Multi Light
description: Lightweight protection against ads, trackers and malicious sites. Safe for low-RAM routers.

name: HaGeZi Multi Normal
description: Standard protection against ads, trackers and malicious sites. Requires ~32 MB free RAM.

name: HaGeZi Multi Pro
description: Comprehensive protection. Larger than Normal — requires ~64 MB free RAM.

name: HaGeZi Threat Intelligence Feeds
description: Blocks domains used in active malware campaigns and phishing. Requires ~32 MB free RAM.

name: HaGeZi DoH/VPN/TOR/Proxy Bypass
description: Blocks known DNS-over-HTTPS providers and proxy/VPN bypass services at DNS level.

name: OISD NSFW
description: Aggressive adult content blocking. Covers adult sites, explicit image hosts and related CDNs.

name: OISD Big
description: Large general-purpose blocklist covering ads, trackers, and malware. Requires ~48 MB free RAM.

name: OISD Small
description: Conservative subset of the OISD Big list. Low false-positive rate, suitable for all routers.

name: HaGeZi Native Tracker
description: Blocks native device telemetry from Amazon, Apple, Huawei, LG, Roku, Samsung and others.
